messages.text: A curse of dread settles over you like a shroud; every strike feels leaden and your aim wanders as doom presses in.
A shroud of dread settles over {name}, and their movements turn leaden and fearful.
The curse of dread lifts and the weight drains from your limbs.
The shroud of dread around {name} lifts and fades.
{name} is shrouded in a curse of dread, their strikes leaden and their aim fouled.
